root.sql: select sc_mem_edit_group.operate_date ,sc_mem_edit_group.membership_no ,pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name(sc_mem_edit_group.membership_no) as memname ,sc_mem_edit_group.pre_member_group_no ,pka_com_function.fp_get_group_name(sc_mem_edit_group.pre_member_group_no) as group_old_name ,sc_mem_edit_group.member_group_no ,pka_com_function.fp_get_group_name(sc_mem_edit_group.member_group_no) as group_new_name ,sc_mem_edit_group.entry_id ,si_security_user.user_name from sc_mem_edit_group ,si_security_user where si_security_user.user_id = sc_mem_edit_group.entry_id /*WHERE*/ --and sc_mem_edit_group.operate_date between '31/03/2021' and '31/03/2021' order by sc_mem_edit_group.operate_date ,sc_mem_edit_group.membership_no
